headline: 5 Goldman Sachs Top Picks for May Are Safe, Pay Dividends With Double-Digit Upside
summary: Founded in 1869, Goldman Sachs is the world’s second-largest investment bank by revenue and is ranked 82nd on the Fortune 500 list of the largest U.S. corporations by total revenue. The Wall Street white-glove firm offers financing, advisory services, risk distribution, and hedging for the firm’s institutional and corporate clients.
